summary: A short, lightly color-graded recap of Secretary Noem's Panama trip: shots of her walking on a tarmac, a red and white repatriation aircraft with detainees boarding, Noem at a podium between US and Panamanian flags (faint 'PROMISE' watermark), and a meeting with Panama's president. There is no audio track and no music; text is conveyed only through subtitle cards.
notable_text: Subtitle cards: 'SECRETARY NOEM WITNESSED A REPATRIATION FLIGHT IN PANAMA'; 'CONVICTED OF DRUG TRAFFICKING, SEX CRIM[ES]...'; 'SECRETARY NOEM ALSO MET WITH PANAMANIAN PRESIDENT MULINO & OTHER GOVERNMENT OFFICIALS'; faint 'PROMISE' watermark behind podium shot.
